description.default: Microsoft Teams channel ID for payroll notifications. Flows post a message here when a new allowance is approved and ready for payroll processing.

label.description: Microsoft Teams channel ID for payroll notifications. Flows post a message here when a new allowance is approved and ready for payroll processing.

hint.default: In Teams: right-click channel > Get link to channel, extract the 'channel' parameter from the URL.

label.description: In Teams: right-click channel > Get link to channel, extract the 'channel' parameter from the URL.
